series_metadata.series_description: All documents related to the design of a new builidng or the renovation of all or part of a current facility. Includes, but is not limited to the Program of Requirements (POR), the schematic design drawings and specifications, the design development drawings and specifications, and the construction drawings and specifications.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Until converted to electronic format, or for three years after project financial close. Review by State Archives prior to disposal. ; Electronic: Until three years after project financial close. Review by State Archives prior to disposal., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
